channel.title: GNtech
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from GNtech, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Truecaller faces mounting pressures as its growth matures
item.description: Slow growth pushes Truecaller toward subscriptions and new features.

item.title: Best iPhone Charger: Cable, Wireless, MagSafe, and More
item.description: Charger options for heavy users and those on low power mode.

item.title: Here's How Much San Francisco Tech Companies Pay for Police Protection
item.description: Records show how much tech firms pay for police protection after recent attacks.

item.title: What Is Ethernet? Everything You Need to Know About Wired Networks
item.description: Ethernet delivers stable, speedy, secure wired connections to the internet and between devices.
